hero.title: Snap It, Never Forget It
hero.description: Scan business cards, whiteboards, menus, contracts with your camera. AI archives everything. Find anything with natural language.
hero.guarantee: Free download · 200 scans/month · No credit card

features.title: Camera × AI = Perfect Memory
features.subtitle: Five features connecting capture → understand → retrieve

items.title: Snap to Remember
items.desc: Photo triggers OCR + multimodal AI. Auto-tags business cards, whiteboards, documents, menus, receipts.

items.title: Natural Language Search
items.desc: Ask 'What was on that whiteboard last week?' AI answers in seconds with source images.

items.title: Multilingual
items.desc: English menus, Japanese signs, Chinese contracts — auto-translated and stored.

items.title: Knowledge Graph
items.desc: AI discovers hidden connections between your records, weaving scattered info into a network.

items.title: Export & Share
items.desc: Export to Notion, PDF, or share with teammates. Knowledge travels with you.

items.title: Privacy First
items.desc: On-device OCR, optional local storage. Your data stays yours.

how.title: 3 Steps, Remember Forever
how.subtitle: From photo to retrieval in as fast as 3 seconds

steps.title: Snap & Scan
steps.desc: Open camera, point at anything. AI recognizes text in real-time, archives in 3 seconds.

steps.title: AI Archives
steps.desc: Auto-detects content type, generates summary, applies tags, extracts structured info.

steps.title: Retrieve Anytime
steps.desc: Ask in natural language, get AI answers with source images. Never forget again.

items.text: "Scanned 30 business cards on a business trip. Asked AI 'what's that Alibaba Cloud guy's name?' — instant answer. Used to take 1 hour, now zero."
items.name: Wei Zhang

items.text: "Scanned menus in Japan, translated instantly. Back home I can still ask AI 'how much was that signature dish?' Incredible!"
items.name: Xiaomeng Li

items.text: "Must-have for grad students! Saved all paper screenshots, ask AI for citations while writing. 2x productivity boost."
items.name: Bowen Chen
